  • Opinions - Supreme Court
  • 2026

2026

Opinions issued by the Supreme Court for the year 2026.

NOTICE: These opinions are subject to motions for rehearing under Rule 22 as well as formal revision before publication in the New Hampshire Reports. Readers are requested to notify the Reporter of Decisions, Supreme Court of New Hampshire, One Charles Doe Drive, Concord, New Hampshire 03301, of any editorial errors in order that corrections may be made before the opinion goes to press. Errors may be reported by email at the following address: reporter@courts.state.nh.us.

Opinions issued after January 1, 2024, are listed in reverse chronological order by their opinion number according to the neutral citation form.  In contrast, opinions issued in 2023 and prior years are listed in reverse chronological order by their Supreme Court case number.  To cite an opinion issued after January 1, 2024, review this notice concerning neutral citation.  Citation to an opinion issued in 2023 or a prior year shall be to the New Hampshire Reports if the opinion has been so published.
